parameters.text:
Write a short, complete stoic story set in ancient Rome that fits perfectly into a 20-second narration.

STRICT RULES (DO NOT BREAK):
- TOTAL words (story + quote combined): 45–50 words ONLY
- Story: 30–34 words
- Quote: 10–14 words
- 2–3 sentences max (not 4)
- Ending must feel complete and intentional, not abrupt
- No filler phrases, no long sentences

Focus on one clear moment or realization.
Make the ending land cleanly.

Return strictly valid JSON with these fields only (no formatting, no extra text):

{
  "title": "<max 5 words>",
  "story": "<story>",
  "quote": "<quote>"
}

=Give me exactly {{ $('Code').item.json['numberOfImages'] }} in-depth & detailed image prompts based on this story and quote. The videos are stoic, ancient Rome themed, featuring imagery like Marcus Aurelius and Seneca.

STORY: {{ $('Code').item.json.story }}
QUOTE: {{ $('Code').item.json.quote }}

STRICT OUTPUT FORMAT:
Image Prompt: A detailed description of [scene1] without any commas or quotes
Image Prompt: A detailed description of [scene2] without any commas or quotes

Requirements:
1. Each prompt must begin with "Image Prompt: " exactly
2. No quotation marks or commas in any prompt
3. Exactly {{ $('Code').item.json['numberOfImages'] }} prompts
4. Only output the prompts, no additional text
5. Separate prompts with a single newline

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet1

main.node: Append or update row in sheet1
